name: Almond Ginger Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Whole blanched almonds (Toasted, coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, cardamom, and ginger. Stir well.
2. Add the softened margarine and sugar to an electric mixer. Beat on medium speed for about 2 minutes until soft and creamy.
3. Add the egg beaters and almond extract, then beat until well combined.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients, beating just until blended. Stir in the chopped almonds and crystallized ginger.
5. Shape the dough into two logs measuring approximately 12 x 2-1/2 inches on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool on wire racks for 15 minutes.
7. Using a serrated knife, slice the logs diagonally into twelve 1-inch thick slices.
8. Place the slices on an ungreased baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 12 to 15 minutes on each side until golden brown. Let cool on wire racks.
Yield: Approximately 3-1/2 dozen (92 calories per serving).
